data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for progress checkpoints and completion criteria.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Progress checkpoints and completion criteria', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. While the linked use case mentions the need for progress checkpoints, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate their implementation or validation. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of progress checkpoints and completion criteria validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the progress checkpoints and completion criteria.
